sentences.arabic: مَدَّتِ الْحُكُومَةُ أَنَابِيبَ الْمَاءِ إِلَى عَشَرِ قُرًى كَانَتْ تَعِيشُ بِدُونِ مِيَاهٍ نَظِيفَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je položila vodovodne cijevi do deset sela koja su živjela bez čiste vode.
sentences.translationEn: The government extended water pipes to ten villages that had been living without clean water.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّكَّانُ يَسِيرُونَ مَسَافَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً كُلَّ يَوْمٍ لِجَلْبِ الْمَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Stanovnici su svakodnevno hodali duge dionice kako bi donijeli vodu.
sentences.translationEn: Residents used to walk long distances every day to fetch water.

sentences.arabic: قَالَ أَحَدُ شُيُوخِ الْقَرْيَةِ إِنَّ هَذَا الْمَاءَ هُوَ أَكْبَرُ هَدِيَّةٍ حَصَلُوا عَلَيْهَا مُنْذُ سَنَوَاتٍ.
sentences.translation: Jedan od starješina sela rekao je da je ova voda najveći poklon koji su dobili godinama.
sentences.translationEn: One village elder said that this water is the greatest gift they had received in years.

sentences.arabic: فَرِحَ الْأَطْفَالُ وَالنِّسَاءُ فَرَحًا كَبِيرًا بِوُصُولِ الْمَاءِ إِلَى بُيُوتِهِمْ.
sentences.translation: Djeca i žene bili su izuzetno sretni što je voda stigla u njihove domove.
sentences.translationEn: Children and women were overjoyed that water had reached their homes.

sentences.arabic: وَعَدَتِ الْحُكُومَةُ بِإِيصَالِ الْمَاءِ إِلَى بَقِيَّةِ الْقُرَى الْبَعِيدَةِ خِلَالَ الْعَامِ الْقَادِمِ.
sentences.translation: Vlada je obećala da će dovesti vodu u ostala udaljena sela tokom naredne godine.
sentences.translationEn: The government promised to bring water to the remaining remote villages during the coming year.
